message:
style: sort imports and format private-overlay service + tests

Linter/formatter cleanup:
- private-overlay.service.ts: reorder imports (type import before named
  import), collapse multi-line ternary in getCurrentEnvironment() to
  single line
- private-overlay.test.ts: alphabetize bun:test and node:fs imports,
  sort named imports from private-overlay.service, expand inline object
  literals in makeTool() calls to multi-line for readability

No behavioral changes.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
